PhD Candidate @ UW iSchool

Marx Wang

Hi! I'm a PhD candidate at the University of Washington Information School, advised by Alexis Hiniker and Anind Dey at the User Empowerment Lab.

My research sits at the intersection of HCI and LLM Alignment. I study how people — especially young adults — relate to conversational AI, and what happens when those systems get emotions wrong. I work across qualitative conversation analysis, computational psycholinguistics, and mechanistic interpretability.

I also run ForYouPage.org, a youth-led nonprofit for mental health advocacy reaching 30,000+ members across 6 continents.

If any of this resonates — let's grab coffee and chat!

  • GitHub
  • LinkedIn
  • Email

marxwang at uw dot edu
